objectives: Architectural review of OpenRouter API Rust client library
Evaluate type-state builder, module organization, retry strategy, streaming, error handling, MCP integration, separation of concerns
constraints: Review only - no code changes in this iteration
important_facts: Codebase compiles clean with no warnings
Branch feat/api-gap-phase1 adds embeddings and key_info endpoints
types/ and models/ have overlapping domain concepts (Message, Usage, Choice duplicated in types/common.rs vs types/chat.rs)
models/common.rs is empty (1 line), models/chat.rs duplicates ChatRole from types/chat.rs
lib.rs uses pub use types::* which could cause namespace collisions as types grow
MCP client is architecturally isolated but does not share retry logic with main client
Streaming uses Semaphore for backpressure but semaphore is never contended (acquired and released within same sequential loop iteration)
API endpoint accessor methods on OpenRouterClient<Ready> all clone http_client per call
11 API endpoint modules, all follow same pattern: struct with client + config, new() takes ClientConfig ref
risks_issues: Semaphore backpressure in streaming is architecturally inert: HIGH
types/ vs models/ boundary is unclear and has duplication: MEDIUM
Glob re-export of types::* from lib.rs risks namespace pollution: MEDIUM
MCP client duplicates HTTP/retry concerns instead of sharing: LOW
API accessor methods clone reqwest::Client on every call: LOW (reqwest::Client is Arc-based)

iteration.summary: Completed full architectural review of the OpenRouter API Rust client. Read all core modules including client.rs, all api/ endpoints, types/, models/, utils/ (retry, security, validation), mcp/, and error.rs. Identified 5 key architectural findings ranging from a non-functional semaphore backpressure mechanism to module boundary confusion between types/ and models/. The type-state builder pattern is well-implemented. Retry logic is solid. Error hierarchy is reasonable but has some semantic misuse.
next_actions: Consider consolidating types/ and models/ modules
Fix or remove semaphore backpressure in streaming
Consider an ApiEndpoint trait to reduce boilerplate across 11 endpoint modules
